claim: Vibe coding (relying 100% on AI without validation) fails in production; 76.4% of developers have low confidence shipping AI code without human review
actionable: Never ship AI-generated code to production without reviewing outputs; structure your AI coding process with validation steps
source_title: Context Engineering is the New Vibe Coding (Learn this Now)

claim: Context engineering (providing all relevant facts, rules, docs, plans, tools) is a paradigm shift beyond prompt engineering
actionable: Invest time upfront building comprehensive context (documentation, examples, constraints) before asking Claude Code to implement; the results will be infinitely better
source_title: Context Engineering is the New Vibe Coding (Learn this Now)

claim: AI coding assistants fail most often because they lack context, not because the models are bad; better context reduces hallucinations dramatically
actionable: Before asking Claude Code to code, ensure it has access to architecture docs, examples, API docs, and explicit gotcha avoidance strategies
source_title: Context Engineering is the New Vibe Coding (Learn this Now)

claim: Claude.md (global rules) should document best practices, testing conventions, style guides, and constraints for all coding sessions
actionable: Create a comprehensive claude.md file with project conventions, testing patterns, and architectural rules before starting a coding project
source_title: Context Engineering is the New Vibe Coding (Learn this Now)

claim: Custom Claude Code commands using slash commands (e.g., /generate-prp) can automate multi-step context generation workflows
actionable: Create reusable Claude Code commands for common workflows like 'generate project requirements prompt' to standardize how you brief Claude
source_title: Context Engineering is the New Vibe Coding (Learn this Now)

claim: Product Requirements Prompts (PRPs) are documents designed for AI coding assistants (not humans), containing research, architecture, and detailed implementation plans
actionable: Generate a comprehensive PRP before asking Claude Code to implement a feature; include API research, existing codebase analysis, and desired file structure
source_title: Context Engineering is the New Vibe Coding (Learn this Now)

claim: RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) with live documentation links ensures Claude Code references current API specs instead of using outdated training knowledge
actionable: Include documentation URLs and MCP servers in your context files so Claude Code can fetch real-time API information while coding
source_title: Context Engineering is the New Vibe Coding (Learn this Now)

claim: Fewer, more abstract tools (e.g., 'get_info' vs 'get_projects', 'get_posts', 'get_users') work better with LLMs than fine-grained APIs
actionable: When designing tools for Claude Code, group related operations into single abstract tools and let Claude fill in parameters naturally
source_title: Context Engineering is the New Vibe Coding (Learn this Now)
